positive: A minimalist, retro-futuristic illustration of a chrome-plated flying car passing through a stylized desert canyon. The color palette is restricted to teal, mustard yellow, and burnt orange. Line art style with clean vector aesthetics, evoking 1950s sci-fi posters, flat design, high contrast.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, photorealistic, excessive detail
